formulas.name: Principle of Sterilization by Autoclaving
formulas.formula: Heat and pressure are used to kill microorganisms

formulas.name: Vernier Caliper Formula
formulas.formula: Least Count = 1/T (where T is the total number of divisions on the main scale)
formulas.variables: Least count, total number of divisions on the main scale
formulas.notes: Used for measuring the dimensions of objects

formulas.name: Gibson's Method of DNA Synthesis
formulas.formula: Exonuclease and DNA polymerase enzymes are used to synthesize DNA
formulas.notes: Used for DNA synthesis in molecular biology

formulas.name: Enzyme Kinetics
formulas.formula: Rate of reaction = k[A]^n (where k is the rate constant, A is the substrate, and n is the order of reaction)
formulas.variables: Rate of reaction, rate constant, substrate, order of reaction
formulas.notes: Used to study the kinetics of enzyme reactions

formulas.name: Principle of Gel Electrophoresis
formulas.formula: Molecules move towards the oppositely charged electrode
formulas.notes: Used for separating DNA or protein molecules based on their size

formulas.name: Principle of PCR
formulas.formula: Heat-stable DNA polymerase is used to amplify DNA
formulas.notes: Used for amplifying DNA in molecular biology

formulas.name: Principle of Centrifugation
formulas.formula: Centrifugal force separates the components of a mixture based on their density
formulas.notes: Used for separating the components of a mixture based on their density
